tweets.text:
Hi, I’m Joshua Lorcy!

Pokemon VGC player & Community Ambassador with 6 years of tournament experience and 3 years casting grassroots and unofficial Pokemon events.

I enjoy breaking down gameplay while keeping broadcasts engaging for both new and experienced viewers.

DMs open!

It ain’t much but I hit Master Ball in Battle Spot singles! Going to aim to hit at least MB3 this season it’s so fun! Shoutouts to @SplashPlateVGC for the help and to @Wiltank for posting about the world’s most evil Vivillon set that guy was so clutch
